title: Creature Valley
description: A lot of healing mods and adventures
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6801b8b0e2c7b30605a382e7c11c74481f8243c.png)



![Feature](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5d5610351a3b07773e314cc067207e4c3ff5604.png)

                                              


○ Mod pack that's good for multiple players.


○ Great for playing when you want to do a light mode pack.


○ Good to do when you're bored.


○ Add Korean Translation with resoursepack.


○ 30 mods and 1 shader.



○ A terrain for adventure and a vehicle for it are included.



○ You can access various foods through various modes of
    adding food.
○ Various backpacks have been added for additional inventory.


![Farming](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48f8bd7a8a08199ef4843e99df25341a004880a1.png)


○ You can grow new crops and make newer dishes with them.
    Cooking utensils and other decorative blocks are added.

![Adventure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce6008cb0212159256af381cf517ee42c061c774.png)



○ Explore the new terrain and new features added to the existing vanilla, and get new items.


![Art](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb14978644758308f546d6ade9e5fd23eff3530a.png)


○ Play using the newly added instrument and cambers, and draw a picture.



If you use this modpack, you can take chances. 
Or you can cook, you can play, or you can just relax on the beach.



If you have any questions please contact support team https://support.curseforge.com.
